message.lifecycle.unload.exception.no-cl: Please do not modify the UniversalPluginUpdater JAR file at runtime, as this can cause serious issues. If you need to update UPU, please replace the file after completely shutting down the server or use UPU's upgrade feature.
message.lifecycle.unload.finish: Unload finished. Thanks for using UniversalPluginUpdater!
message.command.help: UniversalPluginUpdater provides plugin management and information lookup features.
It is similar to APT tools (like apt and apt-get),
and enables options more suitable for interactive by default.
/upu update - update list of available plugins
/upu download - download existing plugins' newer version by downloading
/upu upgrade - upgrade existing plugins by downloading/installing newer version
/upu repo - check or get update configurations using remote repository
See docs for more information about the available commands.
Preferences can be configured through the config file.
This UPU has NO Super Cow Powers.

message.command.repo.help: /upu repo update - Check update configurations from remote repository
/upu repo list [--available|--updatable] - View available update configuration list
/upu repo get [all|PluginID...] - Get and save remote update configurations
